title: Soothing Filipino Shirataki Bowl
description: A resinous, low-glycemic Filipino bowl featuring shirataki noodles, shrimp, and fresh vegetables in a stone-dolsot for a hangover cure.

ingredients.name: Shirataki noodles
ingredients.notes: rinse and boil for 2 minutes, then drain

instructions: Rinse 100g shirataki noodles thoroughly and boil them for 2 minutes, then drain and set aside.
Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a stone-dolsot over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and ginger and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Stir in the sliced onions and carrots, cooking until they soften, about 2 minutes.
Add the shredded cabbage and cook until just wilted, 1 minute.
Toss in the peeled shrimp and cook until pink and opaque, about 3 minutes.
Pour in 2 tbsp soy sauce and 1 tsp fish sauce, stirring to combine.
Finally, fold in the boiled shirataki noodles, then sprinkle chopped scallions and toasted sesame seeds before serving hot.
